title: Croatian Puff Pastry
description: A traditional Croatian pastry filled with tangy filling and baked to perfection.
instructions: Roll out puff pastry to 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut out squares of 6 inches each.
Mix together eggs, milk, and sugar for the egg wash.
Place a spoonful of Croatian filling in the center of each square.
Brush the edges of the pastry with egg wash and fold in half to form a triangle.
Place the triangles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops with egg wash and bake for 25 minutes.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
